article.body_preview:
RANGPUR- Highly profitable banana farming continues expanding in mainland and riverine char areas of Rangpur agriculture region bringing fortunes to many farmers by making them self-reliant.

Officials of the Department of Agricultural Extension (DAE) farmers have brought an all-time record land area of 3,167 hectares of land under banana cultivation during this Rabi season after getting repeated bumper production with lucrative prices in recent years.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: With the DAE assistance, many small and marginal farmers and landless char and riverside people have cultivated bananas in all 58 upazilas
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly states DAE assistance caused widespread cultivation of bananas, directly affecting the specific commercial item (bananas) identified by the 'Product' feature.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: farmers have brought an all-time record land area of 3,167 hectares of land under banana cultivation during this Rabi season after getting repeated bumper production with lucrative prices
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article links repeated bumper production and lucrative prices to increased land area under banana cultivation, directly changing the scale of the banana product's cultivation.
